# Alpine Linux setup-alpine answers file
# Generated by VirtUI Manager
# EFI partition, 1GiB swap, and all partitions are configured via kernel cmdline
KEYMAPOPTS="{keyboard} {keyboard}"
HOSTNAMEOPTS="-n {vm_name}"
INTERFACESOPTS="auto lo
iface lo inet loopback

auto eth0
iface eth0 inet dhcp"
DNSOPTS="-d localdomain 8.8.8.8"
TIMEZONEOPTS="-z {timezone}"
PROXYOPTS="none"
APKREPOSOPTS="-f"
USEROPTS="-a -g {username} {username}"
SSHDOPTS="-c {ssh_server}"
NTPOPTS="-c {ntp_client}"
ERASE_DISKS="{disk_device}"
#DISKOPTS="-m sys {disk_device}"
LBUOPTS="none"
APKCACHEOPTS="none"
